subject: Re: PCM at KI
body:
nothing this year ,, all grants have been made


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, March 26, 2007 1:34:47 PM
Subject: FW: PCM at KI


 
what shall I tell him?
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: jesper@karlavagen90.se [mailto:jesper@karlavagen90.se] 
Sent: Monday, March 26, 2007 1:39 AM
To: Lesley Groff; jesper@karlavagen90.se
Subject: RE: PCM at KI


Dear Lesley, 
could you please provide me 
with an update on the state-of-affairs
sincerely
jesper



On Thu, 15 Mar 2007 16:12 , <jesper@karlavagen90.se> sent:


Hi again Lesley,
please let me know how we should proceed.
I believe Barbro would also like to 
touch base before she goes to stockholm in
about a week. 
all the best
jesper




25.2.2007 01:12
  
hmmm, I have heard nothing...I'm glad you are touching base....let me tell JE you are following up!  Stay warm!  (how about a beautiful fire ...sounds nice!)
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: jesper@karlavagen90.se [mailto:jesper@karlavagen90.se] 
Sent: Saturday, February 24, 2007 2:08 PM
To: jesper@karlavagen90.se; Lesley Groff
Subject: RE: PCM at KI


Hi Lesley, any news ?
All the best from a cold but beatiful stockholm dressed in snow
jesper
 



On Sun, 11 Feb 2007 16:07 , Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> sent:


Hello Jesper.  I have heard nothing as of yet...I will let Jeffrey know you were touching base.
 
:) Lesley
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: jesper@karlavagen90.se [mailto:jesper@karlavagen90.se] 
Sent: Sunday, February 11, 2007 1:31 PM
To: jesper@karlavagen90.se; Lesley Groff
Subject: RE: PCM at KI


Hi Lesley, 
Thanks for your help. 
Did you hear anything from Jeffrey 
on this matter yet ?

Best
Jesper



On Fri, 2 Feb 2007 08:36 , Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> sent:


sure thing!  thx
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: jesper@karlavagen90.se [mailto:jesper@karlavagen90.se] 
Sent: Friday, February 02, 2007 4:01 AM
To: jesper@karlavagen90.se; Lesley Groff
Cc: BEHNBOM@aol.com
Subject: PCM at KI


Dear Lesley, 
could you please forward 
my email below to Jeffrey
Thanks, Jesper

-------------------------------------
Dear Jeffrey,

I very much appreciated the stimulating discussions
all of us had during the dinner earlier this week. 
Thank You! 
Clearly there are several interesting discussion
topics interfacing computation and the material 
basis of life which would be interesting to 
further explore in a network of interesting minds.

Anyhow, please let me know how we should proceed
with the specific PCM proposal at KI and
how I can be of any further assistance. Why not 
have a chat over the phone at a time of your
convenience and I can give you an update
and answer some questions of yours.

I am looking forward to be talking to you soon again.

All the best
Jesper
+ 46 703 282989
www.karlavagen90.se
-------------------------------------

On Sun, 21 Jan 2007 17:03 , Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> sent:


Hello Jesper!  I will double check with Jeffrey and get back to you.  
 
Thank you, Lesley
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
